parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ embeds: [{ title: $json.role || 'Unknown Role', description: ($json.description || '').substring(0, 300), fields: [{ name: 'Company', value: $json.company || 'N/A', inline: true }, { name: 'Location', value: $json.location || 'N/A', inline: true }, { name: 'Source', value: $json.source || 'N/A', inline: true }], color: $json.source === 'linkedin' ? 0x0A66C2 : 0x1877F2 }] }) }}
